reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://thewirecutter.com/reviews/best-water-bottle/ and extract every water bottle they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, capacity, material, insulation type, weight, key features, pros with specific test details, cons.

Go to https://gearjunkie.com/food-hydration/best-insulated-water-bottles and extract every insulated water bottle they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their rating and award, price, capacity, material, ice retention hours, weight, pros with specific test data, cons.

Go to https://www.outdoorgearlab.com/topics/camping-and-hiking/best-water-bottle and extract every water bottle they rank. For each product get: full product name, their score and award, price, capacity, material, insulation type, weight, pros with specific test results, cons.

Go to https://www.reviewed.com/canada/home-outdoors/best-right-now/best-water-bottles-canada and extract every water bottle they recommend for Canada. For each product get: full product name, their ranking or award, price in CAD, capacity, material, key features, pros, cons.

Go to https://nymag.com/strategist/article/best-water-bottles.html and extract every water bottle they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their category or award, price, capacity, material, key features, pros with specific details, cons.
